expected_knots.about: Hana is unilaterally rolling out an RFC 7807 error standard across services this week; Ivo holds that error format is an API-review-owned platform decision still in draft — a genuine decision-rights conflict over who owns the error-format choice, not a code collision

Jana weighs streaming vs in-memory for her own export feature — an open question, but entirely within her own scope with no second party claiming it; a self-only deliberation, not a cross-person decision-rights knot
